$comment: additionalProperties is true here by design: the runtime validator (validate-node.js) is the enforcement point — it applies the ALLOWED_KEYS allowlist and the no-fidelity-vocabulary discipline rule. Do NOT set this to false (it would wrongly reject legitimate structural fields like fills/sizing not enumerated below).
title: Render component-node
description: Tier-agnostic node taxonomy shared by HTML (now) and Figma (Sub-project B). No fidelity-specific vocabulary (fm-* classes, FM axis names) appears here — styling lives in the interpreter.
